understanding.goal_understanding: Place every selectable piece onto goal tile(s) marked with '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, producing a WIN for the level and ultimately completing all levels of the KA59 puzzle game within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each action moved the currently selected piece in 3-pixel grid increments (MOVE_*), with movement sometimes blocked by adjacent objects/walls or producing no effect; some adjacent objects can be pushable and shift when the selected piece moves into them. CLICK switched control to another selectable piece located exactly at the provided pixel coordinates, updating player.id/position to that piece; movement_blocked flags were only hints and not guarantees of failure.
